## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Kirkland Gee and Marcel Santilli to explore potential job opportunity at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a fast-growing AI/marketing startup that just raised a $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [They're looking to hire engineers to build out AI workflows and tools for content/marketing](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Kirkland has relevant experience in SEO, engineering, and AI tooling at ClickUp](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [There's potential alignment on role, compensation ($140-180k), and work flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)

## Topics

### Kirkland's Background

  - [Currently Technical SEO Manager at ClickUp (project management software)](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Previously Director of SEO at an agency](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [80-90% of current role is writing code/building AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Has 8-month old son, values work flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Interested in moving further into software engineering career](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

### fwd.digital Overview

  - [Raised $12M Series A, closing tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [$6M ARR, aiming for $22M ARR this year](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Building AI workflows for content/marketing at scale](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Clients include Webflow, Superhuman, G2](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [25 engineers being hired to build out platform](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Technical Details

  - [Building framework for AI workflows with code generation](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Uses 4-file system (workflows, steps, prompts, runtime layer)](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Auto-generated documentation](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Scaling to handle millions of words per month](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Potential Role for Kirkland

  - [Hybrid role bridging engineering and domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Focus on zero-to-one product development](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Building out new offerings like newsletters, image generation, ads](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Flexibility to balance work and family priorities](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Compensation Discussion

  - [Kirkland's range: $140-180k](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [fwd.digital aims for top of market compensation](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Equity and bonus structure being finalized](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Double trigger vesting, severance package included](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Kirkland to Daniel (CTO) for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Continue exploring potential fit and role details](https://fathom.video/share/kV58FD-FzN5CefxSAnvP6BqjT_jvW2i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
